name: CBJ Jewelry and Pawn
description_short: Family-owned Chicago pawn shop since 1993 offering quick cash loans on jewelry, gold, and valuables, plus retail sales and trade-ins.
description_long:
CBJ Jewelry and Pawn is a family-owned and operated pawn shop located at 5516 S. State St. in Chicago, Illinois. The business has been serving the Chicago community since 1993, building its reputation on fair dealing, honesty, and respect in the pawn and jewelry industry. The company is licensed by the State of Illinois and holds membership in the National Pawnbrokers Association, providing regulatory credibility.

The shop offers three primary services: buying items for cash (jewelry, gold, silver, watches, and coin collectibles), providing collateral-based loans on items of value at competitive rates, and selling merchandise including custom jewelry, watches, collectibles, musical instruments, and power tools. They also accept trade-ins on any items customers wish to exchange. The business emphasizes guaranteed highest prices paid for precious metals and claims to offer the most competitive loan rates available.

CBJ distinguishes itself through its decades-long community presence, family ownership model, and professional credentials including state licensing and National Pawnbrokers Association membership. The business leverages an eBay store (cbj_pawners account) to expand its retail reach beyond the physical location. The shop maintains regular business hours (Monday-Saturday, 9AM-6PM; closed Sundays) and actively promotes sales events like their Father's Day jewelry discount.

As with all pawn shops, customers should understand that loans are collateral-based and items not redeemed are sold as merchandise. The website provides limited information about specific loan terms, interest rates, or redemption periods, which are critical factors for borrowers. Potential customers should contact the shop directly or visit in person to understand exact terms before pledging items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: State of Illinois licensed and National Pawnbrokers Association member, providing regulatory oversight
Family-owned since 1993 with 30+ years of community presence and established reputation
Offers multiple services: loans, buying, selling, and trade-ins all in one location
Claims to guarantee highest prices paid for gold and silver purchases
Accepts broad range of collateral including jewelry, watches, instruments, and tools
Maintains eBay store (cbj_pawners) for expanded merchandise visibility
Convenient Chicago location with posted business hours and direct phone contact
cons: Website provides no specific information about loan terms, APR, or redemption periods—critical details for borrowers
No mention of grace periods, redemption policies, or what happens to unredeemed items
Limited online inventory visibility; customers must visit or call to know what's available for purchase
Closed Sundays, limiting access for some customers
Website does not address customer complaints, reviews, or dispute resolution processes
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own jewelry, gold, watches, or collectibles to pledge
Chicago residents seeking fair-market-value buyers for precious metals without selling to online dealers
Customers looking to trade in used items (musical instruments, tools) for store credit or cash
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted jewelry, watches, and collectibles from liquidated pledges
diagnosis: CBJ Jewelry and Pawn is best suited for Chicago-area residents who need quick cash and own valuable items (jewelry, watches, gold, or collectibles) they can pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparent information about loan terms, interest rates, and redemption policies—borrowers must contact the shop directly to understand exact costs and conditions before committing to a loan.
services: Collateral-based loans on items of value
Cash purchases of jewelry, gold, and silver
Cash purchases of watches and coin collectibles
Retail sale of watches and collectibles
Retail sale of power tools and equipment
eBay resale and online marketplace access
Jewelry and precious metals appraisal (implied by buying/loan services)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
